title: Revelations of Divine Love Ch. 13: God Showed Me a Little Thing
description: Revelations of Divine Love Ch. 13 — God Showed Me a Little Thing
introduction: Revelations of Divine Love Ch. 13 — God Showed Me a Little Thing

translation.text: God showed me a little thing, the size of a hazelnut, in the palm of my hand. It is all that is made.
